pred_reason: The label SWC-107 is reasonable because the contract contains multiple reentrancy vulnerabilities identified in the findings. The lock modifier is ineffective in preventing reentrancy attacks, and cross-function reentrancy risks exist due to external calls in onSushiReward. Evidence: Critical issue with lock modifier failing to prevent reentrancy (Task 1.1.1); Cross-function reentrancy vulnerability via external calls in onSushiReward (Task 1.1.2); Unlocked state variable initialization issue affecting reentrancy protection (Task 1.1.3)

raw.pred_reason: The label SWC-107 is reasonable because the contract contains multiple reentrancy vulnerabilities identified in the findings. The lock modifier is ineffective in preventing reentrancy attacks, and cross-function reentrancy risks exist due to external calls in onSushiReward. Evidence: Critical issue with lock modifier failing to prevent reentrancy (Task 1.1.1); Cross-function reentrancy vulnerability via external calls in onSushiReward (Task 1.1.2); Unlocked state variable initialization issue affecting reentrancy protection (Task 1.1.3)

llm_explanation.reason: The label SWC-107 is reasonable because the contract contains multiple reentrancy vulnerabilities identified in the findings. The lock modifier is ineffective in preventing reentrancy attacks, and cross-function reentrancy risks exist due to external calls in onSushiReward.
evidence: Critical issue with lock modifier failing to prevent reentrancy (Task 1.1.1)
Cross-function reentrancy vulnerability via external calls in onSushiReward (Task 1.1.2)
Unlocked state variable initialization issue affecting reentrancy protection (Task 1.1.3)
